message:
fix: allow reconciliation to drop __none__ cluster sentinel (#9415)

The cluster reconciliation useEffect had an early return when
selectedClusters contained __none__, preventing the sentinel from
being filtered out against availableClusters. This caused
deselectAllClusters() to leave the filter stuck on __none__ instead
of reverting to all-selected mode as intended.

Remove the __none__ guard so the standard reconciliation path
naturally drops the sentinel (it is not a real cluster name) and
resets to all-selected mode (empty array).

Fixes #9414

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
